per_outcome.operationalization: continuous months from incorporation date to initial deal date, measured from company records
continuous months from incorporation to second funding round, measured from company records
continuous months from incorporation to third funding round, measured from company records
dollar amount of funding in investment rounds; reflects investor valuation and capital access, not task speed or quality
indicator of whether multiple investors participate in funding rounds; reflects investor risk-sharing behavior, not task speed or quality
count of software developers employed at time of initial funding; reflects hiring/staffing decisions, not task speed or quality
months to initial funding divided by total employee count, measuring time-efficiency scaled by workforce size
funding amount divided by total employee count; reflects capital efficiency but not task speed or quality
